MERGE (cve_1:CVE {id:'CVE-2023-22527'})
ON CREATE SET
  cve_1.summary = 'Remote code execution flaw in outdated versions of Atlassian Confluence (Confluence Data Center and Confluence Server), described as a template injection weakness allowing unauthenticated remote code execution.'
ON MATCH SET
  cve_1.summary = CASE WHEN cve_1.summary IS NULL OR cve_1.summary = '' THEN 'Remote code execution flaw in outdated versions of Atlassian Confluence (Confluence Data Center and Confluence Server), described as a template injection weakness allowing unauthenticated remote code execution.' ELSE cve_1.summary END

ON CREATE SET
  tech_1.name = 'Exploit Public-Facing Application',
  tech_1.tactic = 'Initial Access',

  tech_1.tactic = CASE WHEN tech_1.tactic IS NULL OR tech_1.tactic = '' THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE tech_1.tactic END,
  tech_1.summary = CASE WHEN tech_1.summary IS NULL OR tech_1.summary = '' THEN 'Adversaries attempt to exploit a weakness in a public-facing application to gain access.' ELSE tech_1.summary END

ON CREATE SET
  incident_1.type = 'intrusion',
  incident_1.summary = 'Researchers observed exploitation attempts for CVE-2023-22527 against outdated Atlassian Confluence servers; attackers executed whoami as a callback to learn access/privilege level.'
ON MATCH SET
  incident_1.type = CASE WHEN incident_1.type IS NULL OR incident_1.type = '' THEN 'intrusion' ELSE incident_1.type END,
  incident_1.summary = CASE WHEN incident_1.summary IS NULL OR incident_1.summary = '' THEN 'Researchers observed exploitation attempts for CVE-2023-22527 against outdated Atlassian Confluence servers; attackers executed whoami as a callback to learn access/privilege level.' ELSE incident_1.summary END

ON CREATE SET
  rel_1.evidence = 'Security researchers observed exploitation attempts for CVE-2023-22527 RCE in outdated Atlassian Confluence; unauthenticated attackers can execute code on vulnerable endpoints.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_1.evidence = CASE WHEN rel_1.evidence IS NULL OR rel_1.evidence = '' THEN 'Security researchers observed exploitation attempts for CVE-2023-22527 RCE in outdated Atlassian Confluence; unauthenticated attackers can execute code on vulnerable endpoints.' ELSE rel_1.evidence END
MERGE (incident_1)-[rel_2:used_technique]->(tech_1)
ON CREATE SET
  rel_2.phase = 'Initial Access',
  rel_2.details = 'Exploitation attempts against public-facing Atlassian Confluence servers via template injection weakness enabling unauthenticated RCE.',
  rel_2.evidence = 'Exploitation attempts observed for CVE-2023-22527 affecting Confluence Data Center/Server; template injection allows unauthenticated remote code execution.'
ON MATCH SET
  rel_2.phase = CASE WHEN rel_2.phase IS NULL OR rel_2.phase = '' THEN 'Initial Access' ELSE rel_2.phase END,
  rel_2.details = CASE WHEN rel_2.details IS NULL OR rel_2.details = '' THEN 'Exploitation attempts against public-facing Atlassian Confluence servers via template injection weakness enabling unauthenticated RCE.' ELSE rel_2.details END,
  rel_2.evidence = CASE WHEN rel_2.evidence IS NULL OR rel_2.evidence = '' THEN 'Exploitation attempts observed for CVE-2023-22527 affecting Confluence Data Center/Server; template injection allows unauthenticated remote code execution.' ELSE rel_2.evidence END

ON CREATE SET
  rel_3.phase = 'Discovery',
  rel_3.details = "Attackers executed the 'whoami' command as a callback to gather information about access/privileges on the system.",
  rel_3.evidence = "Attackers are trying out callbacks by executing the 'whoami' command to gather information about the level of access and privileges."
ON MATCH SET
  rel_3.phase = CASE WHEN rel_3.phase IS NULL OR rel_3.phase = '' THEN 'Discovery' ELSE rel_3.phase END,

    ELSE cve_2023_4969.summary
  END

  cap_ai.summary = 'Capability related to large language models (LLMs) and machine learning (ML) processes.'
ON MATCH SET
  cap_ai.summary = CASE
    WHEN (cap_ai.summary IS NULL OR trim(cap_ai.summary) = '') THEN 'Capability related to large language models (LLMs) and machine learning (ML) processes.'
    ELSE cap_ai.summary
  END
WITH cve_2023_4969, cap_ai

ON MATCH SET
  tech_sidechannel.name = CASE WHEN (tech_sidechannel.name IS NULL OR trim(tech_sidechannel.name)='') THEN 'Network Sniffing' ELSE tech_sidechannel.name END,
  tech_sidechannel.tactic = CASE WHEN (tech_sidechannel.tactic IS NULL OR trim(tech_sidechannel.tactic)='') THEN 'Collection' ELSE tech_sidechannel.tactic END,
  tech_sidechannel.summary = CASE WHEN (tech_sidechannel.summary IS NULL OR trim(tech_sidechannel.summary)='') THEN 'Technique placeholder used to represent data collection via unintended leakage; described here as retrieving sensitive values left in GPU local memory.' ELSE tech_sidechannel.summary END
WITH cve_2023_4969, cap_ai, tech_sidechannel

ON CREATE SET
  mit_clear.framework = 'General',
  mit_clear.summary = 'Mitigation concept: ensure GPU local memory is cleared/initialized to prevent recovery of data left behind by prior computations.'
ON MATCH SET
  mit_clear.framework = CASE WHEN (mit_clear.framework IS NULL OR trim(mit_clear.framework)='') THEN 'General' ELSE mit_clear.framework END,
  mit_clear.summary = CASE WHEN (mit_clear.summary IS NULL OR trim(mit_clear.summary)='') THEN 'Mitigation concept: ensure GPU local memory is cleared/initialized to prevent recovery of data left behind by prior computations.' ELSE mit_clear.summary END

MERGE (mit_clear)-[r_mit:mitigates]->(tech_sidechannel)

  r_mit.status = 'recommended',
  r_mit.observed_effectiveness = 'If GPU local memory is cleared/initialized, attacker listener cannot recover values left behind by writer.',
  r_mit.evidence = 'Text states: "If the local memory is not cleared, the attacker can use the listener to read values left behind by the writer."'
ON MATCH SET
  r_mit.status = CASE WHEN (r_mit.status IS NULL OR trim(r_mit.status)='') THEN 'recommended' ELSE r_mit.status END,
  r_mit.observed_effectiveness = CASE WHEN (r_mit.observed_effectiveness IS NULL OR trim(r_mit.observed_effectiveness)='') THEN 'If GPU local memory is cleared/initialized, attacker listener cannot recover values left behind by writer.' ELSE r_mit.observed_effectiveness END,
  r_mit.evidence = CASE WHEN (r_mit.evidence IS NULL OR trim(r_mit.evidence)='') THEN 'Text states: "If the local memory is not cleared, the attacker can use the listener to read values left behind by the writer."' ELSE r_mit.evidence END

  r_tech_cap.details = CASE WHEN (r_tech_cap.details IS NULL OR trim(r_tech_cap.details)='') THEN 'Data recovery from GPU local memory can expose LLM/ML model inputs, outputs, weights, and intermediate computations.' ELSE r_tech_cap.details END,
